title: GPT 5.6 banned, Fable banned… it’s actually over.
summary: David Ondrej discusses the banning of GPT 5.6 and Fable, asserting that "it's actually over." The claim appears to reference regulatory or policy decisions restricting access to or deployment of these AI systems.
writeup: The video covers reported bans on the AI systems GPT 5.6 and Fable, with David Ondrej framing the development as a decisive turning point captured in the phrase "it's actually over." The discussion centers on regulatory or policy decisions that restrict access to or deployment of these models. The takeaway is the claim that such restrictions mark a significant shift for these specific systems, situated against the broader question of model regulation.
